all.en: Notice is hereby given to all shareholders of Lumen Pacific Holdings.
all.zh: 謹此通知 Lumen Pacific Holdings 全體股東。

all.en: The annual general meeting will be held on June 14, 2026.
all.zh: 年度股東會將於 2026 年 6 月 14 日舉行。

all.en: The meeting starts at nine in the morning local time.
all.zh: 會議將於當地時間上午 9 點開始。

all.en: It takes place at the Grand Pacific Hotel ballroom in Singapore.
all.zh: 地點為新加坡 Grand Pacific Hotel 宴會廳。

all.en: A live webcast will also be available through the investor portal.
all.zh: 亦可透過投資人入口網站觀看現場直播。

all.en: Registration opens at seven thirty for in-person attendees.
all.zh: 現場與會者報到時間為 07:30。

all.en: Please bring a valid photo identification and your share certificate.
all.zh: 請攜帶有效附照身分證件及股票憑證。

all.en: Beneficial owners must present a letter from their broker.
all.zh: 實質受益人須出示券商出具之證明文件。

all.en: The agenda includes six items requiring shareholder approval.
all.zh: 議程包含六項須股東通過之議案。

all.en: Item one, adoption of the audited financial statements for 2025.
all.zh: 議案一，採認 2025 年度經會計師查核之財務報表。

all.en: Item two, declaration of a final dividend of forty cents per share.
all.zh: 議案二，宣告每股 40 美分之期末股息。

all.en: Item three, re-election of three directors retiring by rotation.
all.zh: 議案三，改選三位依章程輪替之董事。

all.en: Item four, reappointment of Cromwell & Yates as external auditors.
all.zh: 議案四，續任 Cromwell & Yates 為外部會計師。

all.en: Item five, approval of the revised long-term incentive plan.
all.zh: 議案五，通過修訂後之長期激勵計畫。

all.en: Item six, authorization for share buybacks of up to ten percent.
all.zh: 議案六，授權公司買回庫藏股至多 10%。

all.en: Detailed explanatory notes appear in the attached information circular.
all.zh: 詳細說明請參閱所附資訊通函。

all.en: Shareholders unable to attend may appoint a proxy in writing.
all.zh: 無法出席之股東得以書面委派代理人。

all.en: Proxy forms must reach the registrar at least forty-eight hours in advance.
all.zh: 委託書須於會前至少 48 小時送達股務代理機構。

all.en: Electronic voting through our portal will close one hour before the meeting.
all.zh: 電子投票將於會議開始前一小時關閉。

all.en: Light refreshments will be served after the formal proceedings conclude.
all.zh: 正式議程結束後將供應簡單茶點。

all.en: Members of the executive team will be available for informal questions.
all.zh: 經營團隊成員將出席接受非正式提問。

all.en: Translation services will be provided in Mandarin and Japanese.
all.zh: 現場提供中文與日文口譯服務。

all.en: Please refer media inquiries to the corporate communications office.
all.zh: 媒體相關詢問請洽企業傳訊室。

all.en: By order of the board, Aliyah Chen, Company Secretary, dated April 30.
all.zh: 依董事會指示，公司秘書 Aliyah Chen，4 月 30 日。
